overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a sunny suburban sidewalk in a residential neighborhood with downtown skyscrapers visible in the distance. The character passes a parked white SUV and approaches an intersection while encountering a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny suburban sidewalk bordered by a stone retaining wall on the left and palm trees on the right. Downtown skyscrapers rise in the distant background as the character approaches and passes a white SUV parked on the street.

events.description: pedestrian appears walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the street corner, approaching a pedestrian walking the opposite way

entered.detail: street corner with curb and crosswalk markings becoming visible ahead
two-story residential house at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: Having passed the parked SUV, the character approaches a street intersection. The stone wall gives way to an open corner as a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction comes into view. Downtown buildings remain visible ahead while the character nears the crosswalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny suburban sidewalk that gradually opens up toward a residential intersection. It begins with the character walking past a stone retaining wall and palm trees, with downtown skyscrapers looming in the far distance. As the character moves forward, the camera passes a white SUV parked along the curb while maintaining a steady pace toward the horizon. The scene then expands as the stone wall ends, revealing an open street corner where a pedestrian appears walking in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera continues its approach toward the crosswalk, keeping the distant city skyline centered in the frame.
